project_type: TypeScript brand/design-token package in a pnpm monorepo
build_system: pnpm + turbo, ESM ('type': 'module'), tsc for compilation
test_framework: vitest ^2 with root config; tests in src/__tests__/brand.test.ts
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm --filter @quant/brand typecheck (must pass with zero errors). 2. Run pnpm --filter @quant/brand test (must pass). 3. Run pnpm --filter @quant/brand lint (must pass).
setup_instructions: pnpm install from repo root (lockfile exists)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node >=22. Do NOT modify any files outside packages/brand/ and docs/brand/.
contribution_requirements: Only modify packages/brand/ and docs/brand/. Do not touch CI, app source, or other packages.
key_patterns: All brand values exported as const objects from individual modules. SVG logos stored as template literal strings in .ts files. CSS variables generated via generateBrandCSS(). Each app has AppBrandConfig interface. ESM module with bundler moduleResolution. tsconfig uses composite:true, strict:true, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess.
directory_structure: packages/brand/src/ contains: index.ts (barrel), apps.ts (app configs), colors.ts (palette), typography.ts (type system), motion.ts (spring/easing/duration), tokens.ts (CSS var generation), logos/ (SVG strings), icons/ (per-app icon SVGs), __tests__/ (vitest tests)
